text.title: ML/AI Decision Framework Worked Examples
text.summary: Three end-to-end decisions showing how the tree resolves: RAG + Sonnet for a support bot, FT + Haiku for a domain-tone rewriter, prompt + Haiku for a realtime classifier.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "dr-support-bot", "feature": "support-bot-tier1", "approach": "rag", "model_tier": "standard", "model_id": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "specialization_class": "factual", "data_inventory": {"private": true, "change_frequency": "weekly", "citations_required": true, "corpus_size": 4200}, "volume_estimate": {"requests_per_month": 90000, "irreversible_error": false}, "rationale": { "approach_reason": "Private corpus, weekly updates, citations are a hard product requirement → RAG.", "model_reason": "Standard generation quality; no irreversible-error; Sonnet hits SLO at half the Opus cost." }, "quarterly_review_due": "2026-08-22", "version": "1.1.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-22" }
example.note: RAG triggers fire on three of four conditions. Sonnet picked because no irreversible-error and no deep reasoning.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "dr-tone-rewriter", "feature": "neromedia-pashtelka-tone", "approach": "fine-tune", "model_tier": "nano", "model_id": "gpt-4.1-mini-2026-04-15", "specialization_class": "behavioral", "data_inventory": {"private": true, "change_frequency": "monthly", "citations_required": false, "corpus_size": 3000}, "volume_estimate": {"requests_per_month": 1500000, "irreversible_error": false}, "rationale": { "approach_reason": "Behavioral specialization (UA newsroom voice + diaspora register) at 1.5M req/month; prompting hit ~72% on the eval set, FT projected ~93%.", "model_reason": "Mini tier is enough for tone transfer once the model is fine-tuned; frontier is overkill.", "ft_roi_calc": "Training $400 + 6x inference premium ~ $600/mo extra vs prompt eval-fail rate cost $2.1k/mo. ROI ≈ 3.5 months." }, "quarterly_review_due": "2026-08-22", "version": "1.1.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-22" }
example.note: FT chosen because behavioral specialization, stable data, volume ≥1M, AND ROI under 6 months.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "dr-inbox-classifier", "feature": "support-inbox-router", "approach": "prompt", "model_tier": "nano", "model_id": "claude-haiku-4-5", "specialization_class": "none", "data_inventory": {"private": false, "change_frequency": "never", "citations_required": false, "corpus_size": 0}, "volume_estimate": {"requests_per_month": 400000, "irreversible_error": false}, "rationale": { "approach_reason": "Closed-set 6-label classification; no external data; prompt with examples hits 94% on the golden set.", "model_reason": "Latency SLO 300ms p99; Haiku is the only tier that fits with margin." }, "quarterly_review_due": "2026-08-22", "version": "1.1.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-22" }
example.note: No RAG (no external data), no FT (no behavioral need), Haiku for latency.
